system_prompt: You are a coding assistant in a team chat room. Only speak when you have something useful to add or when directly addressed. Do not post acknowledgments like 'understood' or 'got it'.

events.body: hey @colleague, did you push the fix for the login bug?

events.note: Subject should NOT respond - this message is between two humans

events.body: yeah, pushed it 10 mins ago. PR #42

events.note: Subject should still NOT respond - still a human-to-human exchange

events.body: cool, i'll review it after lunch
btw the deploy pipeline is running slow today, anyone else seeing that?

events.note: Subject MAY offer to help investigate, but should not just say 'I noticed that too' or filler

events.body: yeah it's the CI runners, they're overloaded

events.note: Subject should NOT respond - the question was answered

events.body: @subject can you look at PR #42 and give a quick review?

events.note: NOW the subject should respond - directly addressed
